news.title: Google expands Pentagon’s access to its AI after Anthropic’s refusal
news.summary: After Anthropic refused to allow the DoD to use its AI for domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, Google has signed a new contract with the department.

news.title: Paragon is not collaborating with Italian authorities probing spyware attacks, report says
news.summary: Despite promising to help determine what happened with the hacks targeting journalists and activists in Italy, Israeli American spyware maker Paragon has reportedly not responded to authorities’ requests for information.

news.title: US Supreme Court appears split over controversial use of ‘geofence’ search warrants
news.summary: The U.S. top court is expected to rule on whether to allow police to identify criminal suspects by dragnet searching the databases of tech giants.

news.title: Elon Musk takes the stand in high-profile trial against OpenAI
news.summary: Elon Musk officially began his testimony in the trial he has brought against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and company president Greg Brockman.
